style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow crimson beneath Sandslash's armored hide, emitting intense heat shimmer that distorts the air like a desert mirage. Ember sparks spiral upward in a chaotic dance, leaving faint trails of orange-orange light, while a crackling crimson aura pulses around its body in jagged, unstable waves. Warm amber fire glow illuminates the sandy terrain, casting long shadows that flicker with the energy of the aura. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
